title: Verify to buy, bid and close deals
description: Anyone can browse Mazal. To transact — auctions, marketplace purchases, private deals — you must complete KYC. It usually takes under 3 minutes.
footer_note: Already verified? Your KYC status appears as a green shield in the header, unlocking bids, purchases and private deals.
profile_subtitle: Both profiles can hold plates as assets. Local buyers can also mount them on their cars.
uae_point_3: Verified via Emirates ID / UAE Pass
select_profile_error: Please select a profile type to continue
identity_subtitle_uae: Enter exactly as shown on your Emirates ID.
identity_subtitle_intl: Enter exactly as shown on your passport.
fill_required: Please fill in all required fields
invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
documents_subtitle: Encrypted, stored in UAE. Used only for verification and regulatory reporting.
doc_address_hint: Utility bill or bank statement < 90 days
doc_funds_hint: Optional now, required for bids > AED 1M
custody_agreement: Mazal custody agreement. I agree that plates purchased will be held under Mazal custody in the UAE until I instruct a transfer, resale, or shipment.
custody_required: Please agree to the Mazal custody agreement
review_subtitle: Verification is typically instant. Complex cases resolve within 24h.
privacy_note: Your details are encrypted in transit and at rest. Mazal shares them only with UAE regulators when legally required.
submit_success: KYC submitted successfully. We'll notify you once verified.
submit_error: Failed to submit KYC. Please try again.
